author: Netflix Anime
text:
Kaguya and Iroha in danger??? 😰 #CosmicPrincessKaguya
With Kaguya and Iroha surrounded, there's only one person who can come to their help.

Cosmic Princess Kaguya! is now playing on Netflix!
https://www.netflix.com/CosmicPrincessKaguya

Subscribe: https://bit.ly/33okaL0

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time.

Kaguya and Iroha in danger??? 😰 #CosmicPrincessKaguya
https://www.youtube.com/@netflixanime

Iroha's life gets knocked off its orbit when Kaguya, a carefree runaway from the Moon, moves in and convinces her to perform in a virtual world together.
